title: clitoria flexuosa var. brevibracteata
intro: Clitoria flexuosa var. brevibracteata, a lesser-known variety of the butterfly pea plant, is a leguminous vine native to tropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, derived from its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Clitoria flexuosa var. brevibracteata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
